name: RustDB Sandbox
postStartCommand: if [ ! -d sandbox-data ] || [ -z "$(ls -A sandbox-data 2>/dev/null)" ]; then ./scripts/sandbox-init.sh; else echo 'RustDB sandbox ready: ./target/release/rustdb --config sandbox-data/.sandbox-config.toml query "SELECT w_id FROM warehouse"'; fi

env.PROMPT_COMMAND: echo 'RustDB sandbox: ./target/release/rustdb --config sandbox-data/.sandbox-config.toml query "..."  |  ./scripts/sandbox-reset.sh to re-seed';
